message:
fix(cache): use WalkDir for deep mtime scan and simplify BEADS_DB check

- Replace shallow ReadDir with filepath.WalkDir to catch modifications
  inside subdirectories (e.g. .beads/history/) that don't update parent
  directory mtime on all filesystems
- Remove dead IsDir() branch that had identical behavior in both arms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
